fields.label: Store URL
fields.helpText: Your WooCommerce store URL (must have HTTPS enabled)

fields.label: Consumer Key
fields.helpText: From WooCommerce -> Settings -> Advanced -> REST API -> Add Key

fields.label: Consumer Secret
fields.helpText: From the same REST API key page

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API keys via WooCommerce system status endpoint

metadata.summary: WooCommerce open-source e-commerce platform for managing orders, products, and customers via the WooCommerce REST API v3.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. In your WordPress admin, go to WooCommerce -> Settings -> Advanced -> REST API.
2. Click 'Add Key'.
3. Enter a description, select a user, and set permissions to Read/Write.
4. Click 'Generate API key'.
5. Copy the Consumer Key and Consumer Secret.
6. Paste both values and your store URL here.
